---
title: "Garden"
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

A live view of my home garden. Source code: [github.com/etrieschman/garden](https://github.com/etrieschman/garden).

The data below comes from the `garden/` submodule, which is a clone of the
garden repo at the time this page was rendered.

```{python}
from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

from garden.app import GardenApp

INSTANCE_DIR = Path("garden/garden-data").resolve()
ga = GardenApp.open(INSTANCE_DIR)
NOW = datetime.now(UTC)
```

## `{python} ga.meta.name`

```{python}
locations = ga.storage.list_locations()
plants = ga.storage.list_plants()
print(f"{len(locations)} bed(s), {len(plants)} plant(s).")
```

## Beds

```{python}
beds_df = pd.DataFrame([
    {
        "id": loc.id,
        "kind": loc.kind.value,
        "area (m²)": round(loc.dimensions.area_m2, 2) if loc.dimensions and loc.dimensions.area_m2 else None,
        "lat,lon": f"{loc.lat:.4f},{loc.lon:.4f}" if loc.lat and loc.lon else "—",
        "substrate": loc.substrate.medium if loc.substrate else "—",
    }
    for loc in locations
])
beds_df
```

## Plants

```{python}
taxa = {t.id: t for t in ga.storage.list_taxa()}
plants_df = pd.DataFrame([
    {
        "id": p.id,
        "taxon": taxa[p.taxon_id].display_name if p.taxon_id in taxa else p.taxon_id,
        "bed": p.location_id or "—",
        "status": p.status.value,
        "planted": p.planted_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") if p.planted_at else "—",
    }
    for p in plants
])
plants_df if not plants_df.empty else "No plants yet."
```

## Recommendations (next 7 days)

```{python}
from garden.services import recommend
recs = recommend.refresh_recommendations(ga.storage, ga.engines, weather=ga.weather)
cutoff = NOW + timedelta(days=7)
soon = sorted(
    [r for r in recs if r.due_at is None or r.due_at <= cutoff],
    key=lambda r: r.due_at or NOW + timedelta(days=365),
)

def _due_label(due):
    if due is None:
        return "no date"
    days = round((due - NOW).total_seconds() / 86400)
    if days < 0: return f"{-days}d late"
    if days == 0: return "TODAY"
    if days == 1: return "tomorrow"
    return f"in {days}d"

recs_df = pd.DataFrame([
    {
        "when": _due_label(r.due_at),
        "action": r.action,
        "target": r.plant_id or r.location_id or "—",
        "reason": r.reason,
    }
    for r in soon
])
recs_df if not recs_df.empty else "Nothing in the next 7 days."
```

## Weather — cumulative since transplant

Each bed's rainfall and growing-degree-day clocks start the day the first plant
was transplanted into it (going outdoors), not from an arbitrary window.

```{python}
# Earliest outdoor transplant per bed — the cumulative clocks start here.
bed_start = {}
for loc in locations:
    transplant_dates = [
        e.occurred_at
        for e in ga.storage.list_events(location_id=loc.id)
        if e.type.value == "transplanted"
    ]
    if transplant_dates:
        bed_start[loc.id] = min(transplant_dates)

obs = []
for loc in locations:
    if loc.id not in bed_start or not (loc.lat and loc.lon):
        continue
    # `since` = this bed's transplant date, so accumulation starts at zero there.
    for o in ga.storage.list_observations(location_id=loc.id, since=bed_start[loc.id]):
        if o.value_numeric is None or o.source is None or not o.source.startswith("provider:"):
            continue
        obs.append({
            "date": o.occurred_at,
            "metric": o.metric,
            "value": o.value_numeric,
            "bed": loc.id,
        })

weather_df = pd.DataFrame(obs)
```

```{python}
# Cumulative rainfall — running total of daily rain per bed.
if weather_df.empty:
    "No weather observations yet — run `garden weather` in the garden repo."
else:
    rain = weather_df[weather_df.metric == "rain_mm"].sort_values("date").copy()
    rain["cumulative_mm"] = rain.groupby("bed")["value"].cumsum()
    fig = px.line(
        rain,
        x="date", y="cumulative_mm", color="bed",
        labels={"cumulative_mm": "cumulative rain (mm)", "date": ""},
        title="Cumulative rainfall",
    )
    fig.update_layout(height=320, margin=dict(t=40, b=20), hovermode="x unified")
    fig.show()
```

```{python}
# Cumulative growing degree days — running total of max(0, mean_temp − 10°C),
# the same accumulation the recommendation engine uses to drive growth stages.
if not weather_df.empty:
    gdd = weather_df[weather_df.metric == "temp_c_mean"].sort_values("date").copy()
    if not gdd.empty:
        gdd["gdd_day"] = (gdd["value"] - 10).clip(lower=0)
        gdd["cumulative_gdd"] = gdd.groupby("bed")["gdd_day"].cumsum()
        fig = px.line(
            gdd,
            x="date", y="cumulative_gdd", color="bed",
            labels={"cumulative_gdd": "cumulative GDD (base 10°C)", "date": ""},
            title="Cumulative growing degree days",
        )
        fig.update_layout(height=320, margin=dict(t=40, b=20), hovermode="x unified")
        fig.show()
```

## Growth-stage tracker

```{python}
from garden.recommendations import CareProfileBundle
from garden.recommendations.care_profile import current_stage
from garden.services.recommend import build_context

bundle = CareProfileBundle.load_default()
ctx = build_context(ga.storage, weather=None)

rows = []
for plant in plants:
    taxon = taxa.get(plant.taxon_id)
    if not taxon:
        continue
    profile = bundle.resolve(taxon.scientific_name, taxon.cultivar)
    if not profile:
        continue
    stage, gdd = current_stage(plant, profile, ctx)
    if stage is None or gdd is None:
        continue
    rows.append({
        "plant": plant.id,
        "taxon": taxon.display_name,
        "GDD": round(gdd),
        "stage": stage.name.replace("_", " "),
    })

pd.DataFrame(rows) if rows else "No plants with growth-stage data yet (need temp observations after transplant)."
```

---

*Page rendered at `{python} NOW.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC")`. Source: [github.com/etrieschman/etrieschman.github.io](https://github.com/etrieschman/etrieschman.github.io)*
